name: The Kira Roll
description: Our signature roll with crunchy prawn, avocado, and cucumber-filled uramaki, topped with seared salmon teriyaki, chives, and sesame seeds

name: The Pixie Roll
description: Crunchy prawn, cucumber, and mango-filled uramaki, topped with premium bluefin tuna and a sprinkle of yuzu sesame

name: Krabby Maki
description: Crispy tempura crab, mango and cucumber filled. Topped with avocado fans, citrus mayo and tobiko

name: Unagi Roll
description: Crispy prawns and cucumber, topped with grilled eel, teriyaki sauce and sesame seeds

name: Snowcrab California
description: Avocado, cucumber and mango filled. Topped with snowcrab mixed in citrus mayonnaise then sprinkled with tobiko

name: Garden Futomaki
description: Vegan - avocado, cucumber, mango, takuan (pickled radish) & Kanpo (sweet gourd) with a drizzle of sesame dressing

name: Salmon Avocado Roll
description: Savoury combination of fresh salmon and cream avocado. Finished with a generous topping of fish eggs

name: Spicy Bluefin Tuna Roll
description: Bluefin tuna in silky, spicy dressing with spring onions, rolled with cucumber and mango topped with shichimi powder

name: Salmon Inarizushi
description: Our salmon inarizushi features a generous portion of fresh salmon on top of the sushi rice, all encased in a sweet and savory fried tofu pouch.

name: Prawn Inarizushi
description: Our prawn inarizushi features a generous portion of fresh prawn on top of the sushi rice, all encased in a sweet and savory fried tofu pouch.

name: Veggie Inarizushi
description: Our veggie inarizushi features a generous portion of fresh vegetables on top of the sushi rice, all encased in a sweet and savory fried tofu pouch.

name: Salmon Poke Bowl
